rental_deposit.title: Consumer Protection Act, 2019 - Section 35
rental_deposit.text: A complaint may be filed with the District Commission by the consumer to whom goods or services are alleged to have been provided in a deficient manner, seeking relief including refund and compensation.

rental_deposit.title: Consumer Protection Act, 2019 - Section 36
rental_deposit.text: On admission of a complaint, the District Commission shall refer a copy of the complaint to the opposite party directing them to give their version of the case within a period of thirty days.
